content: Extend StylistSession schema (title, snippet) + stylist_memory helpers (list/create/get/delete)
Update /stylist endpoint to accept session_id + generate session title on first turn
Add /stylist/sessions CRUD routes + update /stylist/history to take session_id
Extend trend_scout buckets + schema (image_url, source_url, source_name, video_url)
Add API helpers in frontend api.js
Redesign Stylist.jsx to 3-panel layout + embed closet images in recommendation cards
Lint + screenshot QA in Hebrew and English — all green
